entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the history of nation-building in post-colonial Africa
entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Demonstrate mastery of the history of nation-building in post-colonial Africa
entries.learning_activity: (a) Describe the concept and origin of nation-building in Africa
teaching_learning_activities: Guide students in groups to discuss the meaning and evolution of nation-building in various post-colonial African countries
entries.assessment: The concept and origin of nation – building in Africa is well described
resources: speeches on the concept and origin of nation-building in Africa
entries.references: History Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Demonstrate mastery of the history of nation-building in post-colonial Africa
entries.learning_activity: (b) Evaluate the strategies used in nation-building
teaching_learning_activities: Invite a guest speaker to present on the strategies used in nations-building in Africa
entries.assessment: The strategies used in nation building in Africa are precisely described
entries.references: History Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the history of nation-building in post-colonial Africa
entries.specific_competence: 1.2 Demonstrate an understanding of the successes and challenges of nation-building in post-colonial Africa
entries.learning_activity: (a) Appraise the achievements and challenges of nation-building in post-colonial Africa
teaching_learning_activities: Prepare a class debate on achievements and challenges of Nation- building in independent African countries. After the debate let the class weigh the views and finally appraise nation-building in Africa
entries.assessment: The achievements and challenges of nation-building in post-colonial Africa accurately described
resources: reports and speeches on the achievements and challenges of nation-building in post-colonial Africa
entries.references: History Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the history of nation-building in post-colonial Africa
entries.specific_competence: 1.2 Demonstrate an understanding of the successes and challenges of nation-building in post-colonial Africa
entries.learning_activity: (b) Design and carry out a project on nation-building between the 1960s and 1970s (use one African country as a case study)
teaching_learning_activities: Facilitate students to explore a topic for a project on nation-building between the 1960s and 1970s from one of the African countries.
Guide them to design and develop data collection tools; let them collect information, analyse, synthesise and share it before writing and submitting a final report
entries.assessment: A project on nation-building between the 1960s and 1970s by using one African country as a case study is accurately designed, carried out, and a report is submitted
entries.references: History Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the history of Africa’s participation in regional and international affairs
entries.specific_competence: 2.1 Demonstrate an understanding of the regional integration in Africa
entries.learning_activity: (a) Describe the origin and development of the Organisation of African Unity (OAU/ African Union (AU) and economic regional groupings in Africa
teaching_learning_activities: Divide students into four groups and assign them with appropriate references from the internet to study on the establishment, objectives, success and challenges of regional groupings (OAU/AU, EAC, SADC & ECOWAS, Arab Maghreb Union)
entries.assessment: The origin and development of the Organisation of African Unity (OAU/African Union (AU) and economic regional groupings in Africa is precisely described
resources: pictures and photographs on origin and development of the Organisation of African Unity (OAU/African Union (AU) and economic regional groupings in Africa
entries.references: History Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the history of Africa’s participation in regional and international affairs

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the history of Africa’s participation in regional and international affairs
entries.specific_competence: 2.1 Demonstrate an understanding of the regional integration in Africa
entries.learning_activity: (b) Assess the performance of continental and regional integration efforts in Africa
teaching_learning_activities: Prepare a motion on the performance of continental and regional integration efforts in Africa for students to debate. Let them write a report and share the summary in the class
entries.assessment: The performance of continental and regional integration efforts in Africa is evidently assessed
resources: pictures and photographs on the performance of continental and regional integration efforts in Africa
entries.references: History Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the history of Africa’s participation in regional and international affairs
entries.specific_competence: 2.2 Demonstrate an understanding of the history of Africa’s participation in the United Nations Organisation
entries.learning_activity: Appraise African participation in the United Nations and its agencies
teaching_learning_activities: Let students debate on participation of Africa in the United Nations and its agencies (UNICEF, UNDP, WHO, UNESCO, UNCHR, FAO)
entries.assessment: African participation in the United Nations and its agencies is clearly reviewed
resources: pictures and photographs on the performance of African participation in the United Nations and its agencies
entries.references: History Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)
